title: Topology Adaptation NOT VIABLE for Stages 2-4

content.finding: Adaptive topology cannot replace beta/gamma at Stages 2-4. It's a Stage 5 problem
content.evidence: Frozen frame GROWS (2 removed, 70-140 added for topology params). Repeats local proxy failure pattern
implications: Topology is not a shortcut around beta/gamma bottleneck
Stage ordering matters — cannot skip to Stage 5
